zh.lifeSummary: 當Hugh Davenport III於1429年出生在英國英格蘭爾亨波瑞時，他的父親Sir Thomas Davenport Esq26歲，母親Margery de Leigh22歲。他於1430年與Ellen Massey of Tatton結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1483年2月16日在他的家鄉享年54歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Hugh Davenport III于1429年出生在英国英格兰爾亨波瑞时，他的父亲Sir Thomas Davenport Esq26岁，母亲Margery de Leigh22岁。他于1430年与Ellen Massey of Tatton结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1483年2月16日在他的家乡享年54岁，埋葬在英国英格兰。

nameMeanings.name: Davenport
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Lancashire and Cheshire): habitational name from a place in Cheshire named Davenport, from the Dane river (apparently named with a Celtic cognate of Middle Welsh dafnu ‘to drop, to trickle’) + Old English port ‘market town’.

Irish: in Tipperary, this is an English surname adopted by bearers of Munster Gaelic Ó Donndubhartaigh ‘descendant of Donndubhartach’, a personal name composed of the elements donn ‘brown-haired man’ or ‘chieftain’ + dubh ‘black’ + artach ‘nobleman’.
History: John Davenport (died 1670) arrived in Boston, MA, in 1637. He came of an English Cheshire family associated with Capesthorne Hall, near Macclesfield.

variants.name: Devenport
meanings: English and Irish (Lancashire): variant of Davenport . The spelling Devonport is found in Ireland and it may have been this form which gave rise to Devenport.

variants.name: Dunworth
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Eamon, Niall.
Irish: adopted in Ireland by bearers of Gaelic Ó Donndubhartaigh (see Davenport 2).
English: perhaps a variant of Dungworth, see Dunsworth .

nameMeanings.name: Hugh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name, Hugues, Hugo, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from hug ‘heart, mind, spirit’. It was originally a short form of various compound names containing this element. This was borne by the aristocracy of medieval France, adopted by the Normans, and introduced by them to Britain. It was consistently one of the most popular boys' names in the Middle Ages in England, but fell out of favour in the 16th century until it was revived in the 20th century. Little Hugh of Lincoln was a child supposed in the Middle Ages to have been murdered by Jews in about 1255 , a legend responsible for several outbursts of anti-Semitism at various times. The story is referred to by Chaucer in The Prioress's Tale. He is not to be confused with St Hugh of Lincoln ( 1140–1200 ), bishop of Lincoln ( 1186–1200 ), who was noted for his charity and good works, his piety, and his defence of the Church against the State. Since the later Middle Ages Hugh has also been used as an Anglicized form of the Gaelic name Aodh .

en.lifeSummary: When Hugh Davenport III was born in 1429, in Henbury, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir Thomas Davenport Esq, was 26 and his mother, Margery de Leigh, was 22. He married Ellen Massey of Tatton in 1430. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 16 February 1483, in his hometown, at the age of 54, and was buried in England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hugh Davenport III est né en 1429, à Henbury, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Thomas Davenport Esq, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Margery de Leigh, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Ellen Massey of Tatton en 1430. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 16 février 1483, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 54 ans, et a été enterré à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Hugh Davenport III 1429 in Henbury, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Thomas Davenport Esq 26 und seine Mutter Margery de Leigh 22. Er hat 1430 Ellen Massey of Tatton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 16. Februar 1483 im Alter von 54 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Hugh Davenport III è nato il nel 1429 nel Henbury, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Sir Thomas Davenport Esq, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Margery de Leigh, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Ellen Massey of Tatton nel 1430. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 16 febbraio 1483, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 54 anni, e fu sepolto a Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Hugh Davenport IIIが1429年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアヘンブリーで生まれた時，父Sir Thomas Davenport Esqは26歳，母Margery de Leighは22歳であった。1430年にEllen Massey of Tattonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1483年2月16日に故郷で54歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Hugh Davenport III(이)가 1429년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 헨버이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Thomas Davenport Esq(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Margery de Leigh(은)는 22세였다. 그는 1430년 Ellen Massey of Tatton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1483년 2월 16일 그의 고향에서 54세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Hugh Davenport III nasceu em 1429, em Henbury, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Thomas Davenport Esq, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Margery de Leigh, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Ellen Massey of Tatton em 1430. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 16 de fevereiro de 1483, em sua cidade natal, com 54 anos, e foi sepultado em Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hugh Davenport III родился в 1429 г. в местности хенбури, чешир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir Thomas Davenport Esq было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Margery de Leigh, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Ellen Massey of Tatton в 1430 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 16 февраля 1483 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 54 лет и был похоронен в местности Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Hugh Davenport III nació en 1429, en Henbury, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir Thomas Davenport Esq, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Margery de Leigh, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Ellen Massey of Tatton en 1430. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 16 de febrero de 1483, en su pueblo, a la edad de 54 años, y fue sepultado en Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
